positive: A retro vaporwave landscape depicting a grid-patterned sunset over a stylized ocean. Neon pink, electric turquoise, and deep purple gradients dominate the scene. Synthwave aesthetic, 80s geometric shapes, glitch art, high contrast.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realism, natural lighting, muted colors
